Pals.drops: Medium Pal soul, Bone, Crude Oil
Pals.partner: Tomb Raider - Sometimes digs up Bone when assigned to Ranch.

Pals.name: Prixter
Pals.partner: Scorpion Sonar - When activated, it can analyze airborne particles and find a dungeon's exit.

Pals.name: Knocklem
Pals.partner: Steel Guardian Mode - When activated, A steel resolve increases Knocklem;s attack and defense.

Pals.name: Yakumo
Pals.partner: Birds of a Feather - Can be ridden. When fighting together, it becomes easier to encounter pals with the same passive skill as this pal.

Pals.name: Dogen
Pals.partner: Homeward Prayer - When activated, moves to the closest base. Cannot be used within dungeons, etc.
Pals.suitability: Handiwork 3, Gathering 2, Lumbering 2, Medicine Production 1, Transporting 2

Pals.name: Dazemu
Pals.partner: Sand Spirit - Can be ridden. Runs faster over sand.
Pals.suitability: Handiwork 3, Gathering 2, Lumbering 2, Medicine Production 1, Transporting 2

Pals.name: Mimog
Pals.drops: Gold Coin, Dog Coin, Training Manual (XL)
Pals.partner: Unlock - When near a treasure chest, Mimog can open the chest without using a key. The type of treasure chest that can be open depends on the skill level.

Pals.name: Xenovader
Pals.partner: Meteorite Enthusiast - While in team, increase damage dealt to ores, and it's easier to obtain Meteorite Fragment.

Pals.name: Xenogard
Pals.drops: Meteorite Fragment, High Quality Pal Oil
Pals.partner: Crater Enthusiast - Can be ridden. While in the team, it's easier to obtain Meteorite Fragment and Pure Quartz.

Pals.name: Xenolord
Pals.partner: Meteor Wings - Can be ridden as a flying mount. Greatly increases damage pmovement speed while flying.

Pals.name: Nitemary
Pals.partner: Soul Collector - While fighting together, Pals drop more Pal Souls when defeated.

Pals.name: Starryon
Pals.partner: Night Dancer - Can be ridden. Increases mobement speed while mounted at night.

Pals.name: Silvegis
Pals.partner: Aegis Shield - Can be ridden. Increases the duration of the shield when using Aegis Charge while mounted.

Pals.name: Smokie
Pals.partner: Dig, Dog! Dig! - When activated, uses its sharp sense of smell to detect nearby Chromite. While fight together, a large amount of Chromite is obtained.

Pals.name: Celesdir
Pals.partner: Blessing of Purification - Can be ridden. Increases the player's auto recovery speed while mounted.

Pals.name: Omascul
Pals.partner: Masquerade Dance - While in a team, the Pals in the team gain more experience points.

Pals.name: Splatterina
Pals.partner: Blade of Uncontrolled Passion - While in posession, the amount of items obtained from using the Meat Cleaver increases.

Pals.name: Tarantriss
Pals.partner: Tarantriss's Web - Can be ridden. While mounted, shoots spider silk to grapple and enable rapid movement.

Pals.name: Azurmane
Pals.partner: Plasma Dash - Can be ridden. Also allows dashing in the air and moving at high speed.

Pals.name: Bastigor
Pals.partner: Blizzard Crash - Can be ridden. While mounted, delivers crushing blows with an Ice-forged hammer.

Pals.name: Prunelia
Pals.drops: Low Grade Medical Supplies, Beautiful Flower, Carrot Seets
Pals.partner: Prayer for Abundant Harvest - While at a base, Prunelia's prayers bless the crops, increasing their harvest.
Pals.suitability: Planting 3, Handiwork 1, Gathering 2, Medicine Production 3, Transportation 1

Pals.name: Nyafia
Pals.partner: Shot-Nyan Mode - When activated, Nyafia will fire a shotgun at nearby enemies for a limited time.

Pals.name: Gildane
Pals.partner: Sandstorm's Blessing - Can be ridden. Applies Ground damage to player's attack while mounted.

Pals.name: Herbil
Pals.partner: Herbil Pulse - While in team, Herbil uses its healing powers to revive the player when incapacitated.

Pals.name: Icelyn
Pals.partner: Witch's Icy Veil - While fighting together, changes the player's attack type to Ice.

Pals.name: Frostplume
Pals.partner: Peacock Pounce - While fighting together, Frostplume's icy aura sharpens your focus, improving reload speed.

Pals.name: Palumba
Pals.partner: Samba Step - Can be ridden. Runs faster over grass.

Pals.name: Braloha
Pals.drops: Leather, Red Berries, Lettuce Seeds, Tomato Seeds
Pals.partner: Balmy Weather - Can be ridden. While at base, shortens the time it takes Pals assigned to  Breeding Farm to produce eggs. (This effect does not stack.)

Pals.name: Munchill
Pals.partner: Icy Maw - While in team, Munchill cools ingredients inside its mouth, making the food in your inventory less likely to spoil.

Pals.name: Polapup
Pals.partner: Rider of the Snowy Mountain - Can be ridden. Can slide quickly down slopes.

Pals.name: Turtacle
Pals.partner: Spikey Carrier - While in team, Turtacle helps carry supplies, decreasing the weight of armor in the player's inventory.

Pals.name: Turtacle Terra
Pals.partner: Shiny Hauler - While in team, Turtacle Terra helps carry supplies, decreasing the weight of armor in the player's inventory. Also increases attack power of Ground Pals.

Pals.name: Jellroy
Pals.partner: Jellroy Drop - While in team, increases items obtained from salvage. While Jelliette and Jellroy are in your base, Jellroy's watering speed is increased.

Pals.name: Jelliette
Pals.partner: Jelliette Drop - While in team, increases drops from fishing. While Jelliette and Jelliroy are in base, Jelliette's watering speed is increased.

Pals.name: Gloopie
Pals.partner: Sticky Princess - While fighting together, the capture gauge decreases more slowly in the fishing minigame when the capture bars are not overlapping.

Pals.name: Ghangler Ignis
